one_time_description: Ottawa Trust Fund contribution - full transfer of Ottawa Trust Funds to Ditidaht First Nation during the year
economic_notes: Nation has investments in Ditidaht Economic Development Limited Partnership, Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Limited Partnership, Ditidaht Cedar Salvage Ltd., Ditidaht Development Corporation, Ts'aa7ukw Holdings Ltd., Ditidaht River Green General Partner Inc., and Ditidaht River Green Limited Partnership. Revenue sharing of $323,296 received.
notes: Four entities fully consolidated (Operating Fund, Capital Fund, Trust Fund, Negotiation Support Agreement Fund). Four entities on modified equity basis (Ditidaht Economic Development LP, Ditidaht Economic Development General Partnership Inc., Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood LP, Nuu-Chah-Nulth Seafood Development Corporation). Ottawa Trust Funds fully transferred to Nation during year (previously restricted cash of $3,101,134). Long-term debt repayments include $10,697,335 loan forgiven from Negotiation Support Agreement Funds. isc_funding estimated as Nuu-Chah-Nulth Tribal Council amount; total_government_transfers includes NCTTC + BCTC + FNESC + Province of BC + Aboriginal Head Start. Current liabilities calculated as accounts payable $399,242 + deferred revenue $635,258 = $1,034,500. Deferred revenue shown separately as $635,258.
warnings: One-time items ($1) represent 0.0% of revenue — surplus may not reflect ongoing operations
